summary: PR 2717 changed only src/melee/gr/grbigblue.c. The substantive decomp cleanup was replacing two raw __assert("grbigblue.c", line, "0") expansions after OSReport calls with HSD_ASSERT(line, 0), while preserving the report side effects. The rest of the diff is mostly formatting of arrays, line wraps, and brace indentation.

key_files.role: Only changed file; Big Blue stage source with assertion macro replacements and formatting-only churn.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: __assert at grBigBlue_801E93D8 replaced with HSD_ASSERT(1739, 0)
raw_diff: __assert at grBigBlue_801EA05C replaced with HSD_ASSERT(1994, 0)

what_changed.description: Replaced raw __assert("grbigblue.c", 0x6CB, "0") with HSD_ASSERT(1739, 0) after OSReport("*** Not Set Position!(FFlyer)\n").
Replaced raw __assert("grbigblue.c", 0x7CA, "0") with HSD_ASSERT(1994, 0) after OSReport("*** Not Set Position!(Tyukei)\n").
Collapsed several static numeric initializer lists and adjusted line wrapping/braces in existing code without evident semantic change in the loaded diff.
evidence_refs: raw_diff hunks for grBb_803E2938, grBb_803E2D84, grBb_803E2DC0, lbl_803E2DFC

smart_moves.description: Preserved the OSReport calls immediately before converting the raw assert expansions, avoiding loss of report side effects.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: FFlyer OSReport remains before HSD_ASSERT(1739, 0)
raw_diff: Tyukei OSReport remains before HSD_ASSERT(1994, 0)

smart_moves.description: Used decimal source line values in HSD_ASSERT that correspond to the prior hexadecimal __assert line arguments.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a raw __assert expansion has file grbigblue.c, line number, and expression "0", it can map cleanly to HSD_ASSERT(line, 0) if surrounding behavior is preserved.
Do not remove nearby OSReport diagnostics when collapsing generated assert code into HSD_ASSERT; reports can be real side effects.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: OSReport("*** Not Set Position!(FFlyer)\n") retained
raw_diff: OSReport("*** Not Set Position!(Tyukei)\n") retained

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Macro cleanup tactic: replace raw __assert(file, line, "0") with HSD_ASSERT(line, 0) when the macro form matches the source-level assertion and no report side effect is dropped.

evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: empty PR body and bot issue comment
notes: PR body is empty and there are no review comments, so author intent and reviewer rationale are inferred only from the diff and title.
The loaded bot comment says 'No changes' for GALE01, but this intake does not treat it as full build or objdiff validation beyond the text shown.
Most added/deleted line volume is formatting churn; only two raw assert replacements are clearly substantive from the loaded diff.
No naming convention changes are supported by the PR evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Raw assert expansion in grBigBlue converted to HSD_ASSERT while preserving OSReport
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2717 provides a concrete example in src/melee/gr/grbigblue.c where raw __assert("grbigblue.c", line, "0") after an OSReport was replaced by HSD_ASSERT(line, 0), with the OSReport retained.

source_update_candidates.title: grbigblue.c raw assert cleanup examples
source_update_candidates.text: In src/melee/gr/grbigblue.c, PR 2717 replaced raw __assert calls for the FFlyer and Tyukei 'Not Set Position' failure paths with HSD_ASSERT(line, 0), while leaving the preceding OSReport diagnostics intact.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful as a path-scoped example for future grBigBlue assertion cleanup, but should be curated rather than promoted automatically.

rejection_notes: Do not infer a broad formatting standard for numeric arrays from this PR; the diff shows formatting churn but no review discussion or rationale.
Do not infer that the remaining raw pointer arithmetic in grbigblue.c is accepted style; this PR did not address or discuss those accesses.
Do not infer any symbol naming convention changes; no renames are shown.
